mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, directly boosting S&P 500 valuations over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in declining rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 4.5 percent within a single quarter, it signals a labor market deterioration that precedes corporate earnings contraction, depressing equity returns over the subsequent 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 50% of instances where UNRATE crosses 4.5%, or the predictive power vanishes after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and housing starts indicate a synchronized demand-supply shock that compresses corporate margins and equity valuations, driving negative forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint decline signal fails to predict negative 20-day returns when INDPRO and HOUST fall concurrently, or the interaction term coefficient is statistically indistinguishable from zero in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rapid policy tightening, rising CPI accelerations force the Fed to maintain higher-for-longer rates, which compresses equity multiples and drives negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are not significantly negative when CPIAUCSL accelerates and FEDFUNDS exceeds 3.0%, or the interaction effect disappears in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real disposable income proxied by RSAFS increases consumer spending capacity, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window, or positive RSAFS changes do not correlate with positive 5-day forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production falls below 98.0, it indicates a supply-side contraction that triggers inventory drawdowns and margin compression, leading to negative equity returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in more than 40% of instances where INDPRO drops below 98.0, or the signal loses predictive power after controlling for PAYEMS movements.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising unemployment and falling real estate starts signals a broad economic slowdown that reduces corporate earnings expectations, depressing equity valuations over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns when UNRATE rises and HOUST falls concurrently, or the interaction term is not statistically significant in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL exceeds 5.0 percent year-over-year, persistent inflation erodes real wages and consumer purchasing power, leading to earnings downgrades and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 40% of instances where CPIAUCSL crosses 5.0%, or the signal loses predictive power after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.
